description: Brighten up your wardrobe with this feminine pair of casual shoes from puma. Sleek, comfortable and strong in a sleek design, these shoes look great when teamed with shorts, mini skirts and denims and tees for a Kristen Stewart-esque quirk. UpperSynthetic leather with perforation as the upper for lightweight durabilityStitch detailing and contrast piping for feminine stylingLace-ups for snug FitPatent leather overlayMidsoleEco-OrthoLite midsole for maximum comfort, protection from impact and supportOutsoleRubber outsole for traction and gripTextured in waffle pattern for gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine washStore shoes away from sunlight
